title: TTT-VLA: Test-Time Latent Prompt Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: TTT-VLA introduces a test-time training framework for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models that addresses distribution shifts encountered at deployment without retraining the policy. The method, Latent Prompt Optimization (LPO), learns a latent prompt as an additional conditioning signal via a proxy task during training; at deployment, only this prompt is optimized using self-supervised signals, leaving the underlying policy weights frozen. Experiments on SimplerEnv demonstrate consistent performance improvements across single- and multi-embodiment evaluation scenarios.
